verses.1: I was glad when they said to me,
verses.2: Our feet are standing within your gates, Jerusalem!
verses.3: Jerusalem is built as a city that is compact together,
verses.4: where the tribes go up, even the LORD’s tribes,
verses.5: For there are set thrones for judgment,
verses.6: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem.
verses.8: For my brothers’ and companions’ sakes,
verses.9: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God,
